full_text:
Wang Lie (Yanfang) 王烈 (彥方)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Lie (王烈), styledYanfang (彥方), was born in Pingyuan or Taiyuan. A famed man from Taiyuan who refused service and reformed others. Wang Lie lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
